translations.es: Le preguntaré a mi compañera más tarde.
translations.fr: Je demanderai à ma collègue plus tard.
translations.it: Chiederò alla mia collega più tardi.
translations.pt: Vou perguntar à minha colega mais tarde.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ hỏi đồng nghiệp của tôi sau.
translations.nl: Ik vraag het later aan mijn collega.
translations.hi: मैं बाद में अपनी सहकर्मी से पूछूँगा।
translations.el: Θα ρωτήσω τη συναδέλφισά μου αργότερα.
translations.id: Nanti saya akan tanya rekan kerja saya.
translations.ro: O să întreb colega mea mai târziu.
translations.ja: あとで同僚に聞きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes an accusative object ('meine Kollegin') and is modified by a temporal adverb ('später').
Possessive determiner agreeing with a feminine accusative singular noun ('Kollegin'); marks possession.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object (accusative) of 'frage'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates time.

sentences.target: Meine Kollegin hilft heute im Büro.

translations.de: Meine Kollegin hilft heute im Büro.
translations.en: My colleague is helping in the office today.
translations.es: Mi compañera está ayudando en la oficina hoy.
translations.fr: Ma collègue aide au bureau aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi la mia collega aiuta in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的同事今天在办公室帮忙。
translations.yue: 我同事今日喺辦公室幫手。
translations.ru: Моя коллега сегодня помогает в офисе.
translations.pt: Minha colega está ajudando no escritório hoje.
translations.tr: Bugün iş arkadaşım ofiste yardım ediyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay đồng nghiệp của tôi đang phụ giúp ở văn phòng.
translations.nl: Mijn collega helpt vandaag op kantoor.
translations.uk: Моя колега сьогодні допомагає в офісі.
translations.hu: A kolléganőm ma segít az irodában.
translations.hi: आज मेरी सहकर्मी ऑफिस में मदद कर रही है।
translations.pl: Moja koleżanka dziś pomaga w biurze.
translations.el: Η συναδέλφισά μου σήμερα βοηθάει στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Kollegaen min hjelper på kontoret i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini rekan kerja saya membantu di kantor.
translations.sv: Min kollega hjälper till på kontoret i dag.
translations.ro: Colega mea ajută la birou astăzi.
translations.cs: Moje kolegyně dnes pomáhá v kanceláři.
translations.da: Min kollega hjælper på kontoret i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は同僚がオフィスで手伝っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative feminine singular, modifies the subject noun 'Kollegin'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject (nominative) of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive here; event is further specified by a temporal adverb ('heute') and a locative PP ('im Büro').
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates time.
Contraction of the preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem' (dative); introduces a locative prepositional phrase and governs dative case.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition 'im' (dative), indicating location.

sentences.target: Wir trinken Kaffee mit der Kollegin.

translations.de: Wir trinken Kaffee mit der Kollegin.
translations.en: We’re having coffee with a colleague.
translations.es: Estamos tomando café con una compañera.
translations.fr: On prend un café avec une collègue.
translations.it: Stiamo prendendo un caffè con una collega.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们和一位同事一起喝咖啡。
translations.yue: 我哋同一位同事一齊飲咖啡。
translations.pt: Estamos tomando café com uma colega.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang uống cà phê với một đồng nghiệp.
translations.nl: We drinken koffie met een collega.
translations.hi: हम एक सहकर्मी के साथ कॉफी पी रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi drikker kaffe med en kollega.
translations.id: Kami sedang minum kopi dengan seorang rekan kerja.
translations.da: Vi drikker kaffe med en kollega.
translations.ja: 私たちは同僚とコーヒーを飲んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes a direct object ('Kaffee') and a comitative PP ('mit der Kollegin').
Common noun, masculine (mass/count); here accusative singular without article; direct object of 'trinken'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a comitative phrase.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Kollegin' under the preposition 'mit'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'mit' (dative), expressing accompaniment.

sentences.target: Er wartet draußen auf die Kollegin.

translations.de: Er wartet draußen auf die Kollegin.
translations.en: He is waiting outside for his colleague.
translations.es: Él está esperando afuera a su compañera.
translations.it: Sta aspettando la sua collega fuori.
translations.ru: Он ждёт свою коллегу на улице.
translations.pt: Ele está esperando sua colega do lado de fora.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang đợi đồng nghiệp của mình ở bên ngoài.
translations.nl: Hij wacht buiten op zijn collega.
translations.uk: Він чекає свою колегу на вулиці.
translations.hi: वह बाहर अपनी सहकर्मी का इंतज़ार कर रहा है।
translations.pl: On czeka na swoją koleżankę na zewnątrz.
translations.nb: Han venter utenfor på kollegaen sin.
translations.id: Dia sedang menunggu rekan kerjanya di luar.
translations.sv: Han väntar utanför på sin kollega.
translations.da: Han venter udenfor på sin kollega.
translations.ja: 彼は外で同僚を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms a prepositional construction with 'auf' (+ accusative) for its object.
Spatial adverb modifying the verb; indicates location.
Preposition; with 'warten' it selects accusative case and introduces the object of waiting.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; agrees with 'Kollegin' under the preposition 'auf' in this construction.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'auf' (accusative), complement of the prepositional verb 'warten auf'.

He is waiting outside for his colleague.
